title: CustomActionType
content:
# CustomActionType


## Properties

- **created** (`string`): UTC time when the Custom Action Type was created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **created_by** (`string`): The user or process that initiated the creation of this custom action type.
- **name** (`string`): Unique identifier `name` for the Custom Action Type.
- **title** (`string`): 
- **updated** (`string`): UTC time when any Custom Action Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **updated_by** (`string`): The user or process that updated this custom action type.
summary: Object with properties: created, created_by, name, title, updated

created.description: UTC time when the Custom Action Type was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: The user or process that initiated the creation of this custom action type.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` for the Custom Action Type.

updated.description: UTC time when any Custom Action Type keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated_by.description: The user or process that updated this custom action type.
